programme.title: Will & Grace
programme.desc: Karen and Grace have a heart-to-heart and Will reluctantly takes Jack along to his swanky gym - but is too embarrassed to introduce him to his straight friends. Comedy, starring Eric McCormack and Debra Messing

programme.title: Will & Grace
programme.desc: A publicist offers Grace a permanent job as an interior designer, but expects a favour in return - a date with an extremely reluctant Will. Miguel Ferrer guest stars

programme.title: Will & Grace
programme.desc: Rob and Ellen refuse to play charades with Will and Grace because they are too competitive. Meanwhile, Karen's quick thinking saves a workman's life. Comedy, starring Eric McCormack and Debra Messing

programme.title: My Wife and Kids
programme.desc: Michael tries to teach Junior the ins and outs of the family business, but finds him an unwilling pupil. Meanwhile, Claire arranges a secret date with someone she met over the internet

programme.title: My Wife and Kids
programme.desc: Jay decides to do something new in her life by studying psychology at college, but Michael opposes the idea

programme.title: Nightmare Tenants, Slum Landlords
programme.desc: The tale of an elderly couple whose hopes of a peaceful retirement were ruined when their tenants stopped paying rent, then moved in their abusive friends who became squatters. With the house becoming a free-for-all and in a terrible state of repair, and the couple facing a barrage of verbal threats and abusive behaviour, they have been forced to seek help in an attempt to get their property back. Plus, a man who cannot sell his house because his sitting tenant refuses to leave

programme.title: Nightmare Tenants, Slum Landlords
programme.desc: In Bristol, eviction lawyer Chris deals with a complex case in which squatters have broken into an empty pub and are now refusing to leave, with landlord Alex wanting them out as he is awaiting planning permission to turn the pub into flats. Jill is trying to regain a property she and her late husband bought as an investment, which she has been renting out to alleviate financial stress

programme.title: Can't Pay? We'll Take It Away!
programme.desc: Stewart and Vic take on an eviction case in Nottingham, where a landlord wants his property back after months of rent arrears and alleged anti-social behaviour - and find themselves confronted by a volatile tenant who insists he has the right to stay and refuses to back down. The duo also chase £5,000 for an unpaid parking fine, which comes as a shock to the debtor, who has clearly hit hard times

programme.title: Can't Pay? We'll Take It Away!
programme.desc: Matt and Garry try to recover more than £6,000 owed in nursery fees in Warwickshire, while Gary and Cona head to West Sussex, chasing £11,000 owed by a businessman who has defaulted on a previous plan, and have no option but to break into the property. The pair also head down to the south coast of England, seeking more than £3,500 owed for an unpaid loan

programme.title: Can't Pay? We'll Take It Away!
programme.desc: Matt and Garry are in Wolverhampton, where a woman who owes £2,000 in parking fines denies knowing the debtor - despite being a relative. But when her mother also gets involved, tempers start to fray. Stewart and Iain confront a woman in Cheshire who is refusing to pay fees to a veterinary practice, claiming her dog has been misdiagnosed, while Paul and Max collect £5,000 owed by a banned company director in east London accused of mis-selling assets on the stock market

programme.title: Can't Pay? We'll Take It Away!
programme.desc: Gary and Paul visit Kent to recover £2,500 owed by a publican to a utilities supplier - only to find themselves in the middle of a family at war. Stewart and Elmor deal with a sensitive case in Liverpool, as they repossess a property where the tenant has failed to pay any rent for almost a year

programme.title: Police Interceptors
programme.desc: Dog handler Martyn finds himself in the firing line when a suspect lashes out, Dan is given the runaround by an uninsured driver and Jon deals with a shoplifter who has been caught by members of the public. Finally, Mike meets a pair of very hungry late-night speeders

programme.title: Police Interceptors
programme.desc: In this special edition, Ortis Deley and Rick Edwards join police using cutting-edge technology to crack down on crime, including tiny thermal-imaging cameras, handheld fingerprint sensors and tracking drones. Ortis joins Cheshire interceptors on a thrilling motorway pursuit, while Rick and the team tackle a drug driver and officers discover a massive cannabis farm

programme.title: Neighbours
programme.desc: David and Aaron are thrown by the arrival of Emmett's brother, Brent. Karl's concern for Jane increases, so he does some snooping before making a mysterious phone call

programme.title: Home and Away
programme.desc: Willow confronts Jasmine about her sinister forum activity, and Leah and Justin work to keep Jasmine from seeing Tori and Grace

programme.title: Can't Pay? We'll Take It Away!
programme.desc: Agents Max and Steve in East London try to recover over £7,000 owed by a restaurant owner for an unpaid gas bill, while officers Gareth and Mitch in Gloucestershire seek just under £3,000 from the owner of a car wash. Stewart and Vic are in Manchester trying to recover nearly £5,000 owed by a blinds and shutters supplier to a dissatisfied customer

programme.title: Criminals: Caught on Camera
programme.desc: Journalist Nick Wallis joins police forces around the nation to discover how CCTV is helping to bring criminals using weapons to justice. A CCTV operator's instincts lead him to keep an eye on a man acting suspiciously on a train station platform and who then takes a knife out of his pocket and threatens a woman coming towards him. There is also footage of a raid on a west London jewellery shop, with the gang spraying bleach in the eyes of security guards and smashing down the doors with pickaxes while the terrified staff cower inside

programme.title: Robbing Your Relatives
programme.desc: Return of the documentary taking a look at what can happen when families fall out over money. The first episode examines the case of a teenager cheated out of her grandfather's inheritance by her own dad and stepmother. The pair forged signatures and lied to solicitors and banks to steal the money, then frittered it away on luxuries and paying off their own debts. There is also the story of a pair of identical twins who fell out over a £55,000 loan, and a man who was alleged to have robbed his mother's pension and life savings, but took his own life before justice was done

programme.title: Filthy House SOS
programme.desc: Cleaning duo Jon and Brennan take on some of Britain's filthiest homes. This episode features Lee, who lost control of his cleaning when he started a mental health network

programme.title: The Sex Business
programme.desc: The documentary explores the lives of straight sex workers who have turned their heterosexual predilections upside down to perform in gay roles for money. A cammer and porn star reveal what it takes to sell sex to fellow performers of the same gender, despite being straight in their private lives

programme.title: Nightmare Tenants, Slum Landlords

programme.title: Nightmare Tenants, Slum Landlords

Stewart and Elmor deal with a sensitive case in Liverpool, as they repossess a property where the tenant has failed to pay any rent for almost a year

programme.title: Can't Pay? We'll Take It Away!
programme.desc: Documentary series giving an insight into the world of debt collection from the perspectives of debtors, creditors and those who collect the payments. Brian and Graham have been warned to expect trouble as they evict some tenants from a south London flat, one of whom has a reputation for violence. Everything goes smoothly until the enforcement agents make a shocking discovery in a child's bedroom. Paul and Steve head to Slough to collect wages owed to a freelance worker, but the debtor is less than happy to find the high-court enforcement officers on his doorstep and things get physical

programme.title: Can't Pay? We'll Take It Away!
programme.desc: Sheriff Paul Bohill tackles the case of a small debt owed by ex-footballer Neil 'Razor' Ruddock to a kennel owner, before being forced to evict a school dinner lady in south London. Meanwhile, in the north of England enforcement agent Stewart MacCracken heads out with trainee Iain Taylor to confront a Yorkshire builder they need to get payment from at his home, while a reptile shop owner hit by online competitors urgently needs to pay a debt for the feed company he relies on to keep his animals alive

programme.title: Can't Pay? We'll Take It Away!

programme.title: Police Interceptors

The Caddys rank in the top 10 per cent of Britain's wealthy, and live in a seven-bedroom home, while for the eight-strong Williams family, who are among the nation's poorest 10 per cent, the swap means leaving their rented three-bedroom house and enjoying a weekly budget of £1,700 instead of their usual £110

programme.desc: The documentary examining the lives of individuals on the dole in the UK follows the stories of Roma people who moved to the UK and are now surviving on payments from the welfare state. programme.desc: Goren and Eames investigate the deaths of a museum curator and an art authenticator. Initial evidence points to a murder and suicide, but a fake Monet masterpiece discovered in the studio helps expose a lucrative racket involving priceless forged paintings believed to have been sunk in a Nazi U-boat in 1945. Vincent D'Onofrio and Kathryn Erbe star

programme.title: Law & Order: Special Victims Unit
programme.desc: A boy is accused of killing one of his classmates, and Cabot feels she has no choice but to put the suspect in the temporary care of psychiatric evaluators. However, Munch and Cragen's investigation uncovers the seedy truth behind a drugs ring which uses children as pawns. Drama, starring Dann Florek and Richard Belzer

programme.title: Law & Order: Special Victims Unit
programme.desc: The team is called in when a psychologist is found murdered outside a convenience store and all the evidence points to one of her patients - a disturbed man who refuses to take his medication. However, the discovery of a second, surviving victim behind the shop blows the lid off its theory

programme.title: Law & Order: Special Victims Unit
programme.desc: The team joins forces with detectives from the 47th Precinct to investigate the murder of a suspected sex offender, and Cragen becomes convinced witness and wealthy heiress Stephanie Mulroney is involved in the crime. programme.title: Law & Order: Special Victims Unit
programme.desc: Detectives investigate the sexual assault and suspicious death of an elderly woman, and question two teenagers who will only admit to breaking into the victim's apartment - until they confess somebody else was in there at the same time. Drama, starring Christopher Meloni and Mariska Hargitay

programme.title: Taken
programme.desc: Drama based on the film trilogy of the same name, with Clive Standen starring as a younger version of Liam Neeson's character, Bryan Mills. In the opening episode, the murder of Bryan's sister sets him on a course for revenge against a cartel boss. He kills the son of the terrorist and drug lord Carlos Mejia, while saving the life of an undercover DEA agent, Mike Hall

programme.title: Taken
programme.desc: Bryan Mills continues to be haunted by the death of his sister, and as a result, fails to operate effectively as part of the covert operations team. His actions lead to him being sidelined by Hart

programme.title: Law & Order

programme.title: Law & Order

programme.title: NCIS: New Orleans

programme.title: NCIS: New Orleans
programme.desc: Tammy has an unexpected reunion with ex-husband Ethan, who embezzled millions in disaster relief funds and is connected to the murder of a crime boss's son. programme.desc: Documentary following members of the New Zealand highway patrol as they witness some of the best and worst behaviour on the nation's motorways. There is also footage of drivers falling asleep at the wheel, overloaded vehicles and suspects caught with illegal substances - plus a host of excuses as the people pulled over try to persuade officers they have not done anything wrong

programme.title: Star Trek: The Next Generation

programme.title: Star Trek: The Next Generation

programme.title: Merlin
programme.desc: Mordred becomes torn between loyalty and love, little realising the path he chooses will shape Camelot's destiny - and as the drums of war beat louder, Merlin feels trapped by the cruel circle of fate. Can he really do nothing to stop his dreams of Albion crumbling to dust? Fantasy drama, starring Colin Morgan and Alexander Vlahos

programme.title: The Good Doctor
programme.desc: Medic Shaun Murphy questions the need for an elective surgery that will allow his young patient to smile for the first time. Meanwhile, Dr Claire Browne and Dr Morgan Reznick discover that their patient lied about her identity. Drama, starring Freddie Highmore, Antonia Thomas, Chuku Modu and Fiona Gubelmann

programme.title: Paramedics: Life on the Line
programme.desc: Janice and Aaron deal with a patient who has a strange reaction to a dislocated shoulder, while Ole spots someone having a seizure on the street

programme.title: CSI: Crime Scene Investigation
programme.desc: Part two of two. With the kidnapper dead, Grissom has no clue as to Stokes' whereabouts, until a severed thumb found at the warehouse is traced back to a convict - the abductor's daughter. However, time is pressing as the air in the detective's coffin runs out

programme.title: Brit Cops

programme.title: Road Wars

programme.desc: The story of drug runner Jeremy Khinoo, who made the mistake of using fake banknotes at a service station and was arrested

programme.title: Star Trek: The Next Generation

programme.title: Star Trek: The Next Generation
programme.desc: Legendary villain Professor Moriarty is accidentally recreated and proceeds to wreak havoc aboard the Enterprise. Sci-fi adventure, guest starring Stephanie Beacham

programme.desc: Part one of the two-part finale of the magical adventure series. Morgana prepares to wage war on Camelot with Mordred at her side, while Merlin finds the burden of his destiny weighing heavily as the ancient prophecies play out with unnerving accuracy. It soon becomes clear that the young wizard must find a way to save himself before he can help his allies bring about the salvation of his beloved kingdom. Colin Morgan, Bradley James and Katie McGrath star

programme.title: Spitfire Women
programme.desc: The story of the 168 female pilots who served in Britain's Air Transport Auxiliary - an organisation responsible for delivering aircraft to the RAF on the front lines of battle during the Second World War. Despite having no radio or navigation equipment, ATA pilots were expected to fly any kind of aircraft to the destinations where they were most needed, often risking their lives in the process. The film also features interviews with the last surviving female veterans, who speak about the dangers they encountered in the skies and the discrimination they faced back home

programme.title: The Chase
programme.desc: Bradley Walsh presents as four contestants pit their wits against one of the ruthless Chasers in the hope of winning a potential prize pot worth thousands of pounds. They work as a team and play strategically to answer general knowledge questions against the clock and race down the game board to the exit without being caught
